summary: Auditable ownership map for the already-landed focused regression matrix and related milestone-f proof surface.

supersedes.reason: Historical placeholder was marked completed without a feature-owned artifact or reviewable ownership trail; this corrective evidence feature now solely owns VAL-TEST-001.

proofSlices.contractSlice: table_as storage identity is proven independently from other runtime concerns
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Shows alias metadata/storage/read identity as a focused proof slice instead of relying on a broad mixed foreign-save regression.

proofSlices.contractSlice: macro-generated alias identity and bridge dispatch use the same storage identity seam
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Separates macro identity/hydration ownership from repository-path changes so scrutiny can audit the full table_as proof surface concretely.

proofSlices.contractSlice: public API recommendation and docs/rustdoc proof are validated separately from runtime semantics
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Shows the validation matrix separates documentation/public-surface proof from runtime storage/decode behavior.

proofSlices.contractSlice: decode boundary normalization is proven with a dedicated focused regression rather than by alias/business graph side effects
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Demonstrates decode normalization has its own focused proof slice and is not being inferred from the milestone-f runtime proofs.

proofSlices.contractSlice: schema-managed vs schemaless contracts are proven independently from business graph semantics
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Shows schema side effects are not used as implicit proof for unrelated persistence/read semantics.

proofSlices.contractSlice: explicit-id primitive/conflict semantics are proven independently from alias/decode/business graph behavior
proofSlices.whyItMatters: Records that explicit-id write semantics belong to their own focused regression area rather than being folded into broad integration coverage.

ownershipConclusion.claim: VAL-TEST-001 is satisfied by an auditable mapping of already-landed focused proofs to their concrete owning feature commits/artifacts, rather than by inferring ownership from unrelated history.
